<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Create An Automation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/automations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a **Flow** automation.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["definitionType","config"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Automation name"},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON"],"description":"Automation definition type. The currently supported type is SCRIPT_JSON.","title":"AutomationDefinitionType"},"config":{"type":"object","description":"JSON automation script, please refer to [JSON automation script definition](../../aqara-studio/api-references/json-automation-script).","additionalProperties":true}},"title":"CreateAutomationRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
